  {
    "role": "Machine Learning Engineer",

    "skills": [

      "programming",
      "data science",
      "software engineering",
      "machine learning frameworks like Keras or PyTorch",
      "libraries like scikit-learn or pandas",
      "visualizing and manipulating big datasets",
      "text representation techniques (e.g., ngrams, bag of words, sentiment analysis)",
      "statistics and classification algorithms",
      "OpenCV",
      "hardware selection for ML models"
    ],
    "description": "We are looking for a Machine Learning expert to lead our efforts in creating Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Natural Language Processing (NLP) based products. Your responsibilities include creating machine learning models and retraining systems. To do this job successfully, you need exceptional skills in statistics and programming. If you also have knowledge of data science and software engineering, we would like to meet you. Your ultimate goal will be to shape and build efficient self-learning applications.\n\nResponsibilities include understanding business objectives and developing models to achieve them, managing resources, analyzing ML/NLP algorithms, exploring and visualizing data, supervising data acquisition, finding datasets, defining validation strategies, preprocessing and feature engineering, data augmentation, training and tuning models, analyzing errors, and deploying models to production.\n\nQualifications include at least 3 years of experience as an ML/NLP Engineer or similar role, proficiency in ML frameworks like Keras or PyTorch, libraries like scikit-learn or pandas, expertise in data visualization, understanding of text representation techniques, and proficiency with OpenCV. A degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, Computational Linguistics, or a similar field is required."
  }
